rules.name: fec_committee_id_match
rules.description: Donor contributed to a FEC committee whose name matches \bAnti.?Defamation League\b, \bADL Action\b, or \bADL\b (word-boundaried). Confidence: high.

rules.name: fec_employer_match
rules.description: Donor's FEC employer field matches \bANTI.?DEFAMATION LEAGUE\b or \bADL\b. Confidence: medium. Sensitive: true (employed by ADL).

rules.name: local_employer_match
rules.description: Donor's HD-41 contribution employer field matches ADL patterns. Confidence: medium. Sensitive: true.
